title: 菊花賞の後に・聡明剛毅

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So much for my grand ambitions.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For all that I strove to demonstrate my Emperor's
strength, I have nothing to show for it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're right. So long as my pride remains
unbroken, the crowd may still place their hopes in
me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will enter the Arima Kinen... and in that crucible
of ambitions, I will finally make my mark.
choice_data_list: I know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Your faith will be the lamp that lights
my way.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I will continue forth, no matter what
obstacles present themselves before me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we resolve to fix our sights on the Arima
Kinen...
I'm coming in.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Good work out there, Prez.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Brian. It's not often you come to watch me
race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was interested in seeing who the strongest
Umamusume was.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Shame about how it turned out. How does it feel
to be toppled from your throne?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Surprisingly refreshing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Putting on a brave face, huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"The Emperor's Comeback" would make a rather
good headline, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nothing fazes you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to go toe-to-toe with you someday. You
look like an opponent worth sinking my teeth
into.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
By all means. I'm confident I can weather a gentle
nibble.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, enough of that. Is Air Groove not with
you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it was egotistical of me to assume that
she would be watching... Or could it be that she
has something to attend to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You know, probing people isn't really your speed.
You make it too obvious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's not what I—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Are you worried she won't follow you if you don't
keep an eye on her?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Never mind. Anyway, you did good today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Get yourself some rest. You've earned it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You know, Trainer... About what Brian just said—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, I'm from the newspaper. Do you have
a minute?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Of course. Just give me a moment to get ready.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: We can pick this up later. The press is calling.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am certain they will be excited to hear what the
Emperor will do following her defeat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, however, Symboli Rudolf winds up
swamped with interviews, and we never get the
chance to have that talk.
